description: Use this API to return complex machine quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = macdt2(ibus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the machine quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Actual generator power output in MW/Mvar.
Same as ‘PQ’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine impedance (Rpos + j X).
Zero sequence grounding impedance in per unit or ohms according to the machine’s grounding impedance data input/output code.
Zero sequence grounding impedance in per unit.

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Machine not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bus type code is not 2 or 3; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
Invalid value of ‘STRING’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Sequence data not in case for STRING = ‘ZPOS’, ‘ZNEG’, or ‘ZZERO’, ‘ZGRND’, or ‘ZGRNDPU’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
